name.zh: AD CS 通用工作流（工具迁移）

description.zh: 该源卡片由工具命令组成，现按 Certipy、Rubeus、Impacket 与 HTTP 端点审计职责拆分，不再作为独立 Payload 展示。
description.en: This source card consists of tool commands and is split by Certipy, Rubeus, Impacket, and HTTP endpoint-audit responsibility instead of remaining a standalone payload.

prerequisites.zh: 仅在隔离实验域使用合成身份、专用模板和可回滚 CA 配置，记录域、CA、模板与工具版本。
prerequisites.en: Use synthetic identities, dedicated templates, and rollback-ready CA configuration only in an isolated lab, recording domain, CA, template, and tool versions.

prerequisites.zh: 先导出模板与 CA 配置并建立证书、事件日志和网络流量采集，禁止向生产 CA 发起请求。
prerequisites.en: Export template and CA configuration first and enable certificate, event-log, and network capture without sending requests to a production CA.

overview.zh: AD CS 通用工作流 的原内容没有独立协议载荷，全部是命令行工具调用。迁移后，技术条件、证据和回滚要求保留在双语说明中，具体参数只在对应工具卡维护。
overview.en: The original General AD CS Workflow content has no standalone protocol payload and consists entirely of CLI invocations. After migration, technique conditions, evidence, and rollback requirements remain documented while parameters are maintained only in the relevant tool cards.

vulnerability.zh: AD CS 风险来自模板权限、扩展 Key Usage、Subject/SAN 供应、Enrollment Agent、CA 标志、Web Enrollment 与身份绑定组合，而不是工具输出中出现 ESC 标签。
vulnerability.en: AD CS risk comes from combinations of template permissions, extended key usage, subject or SAN supply, enrollment agents, CA flags, web enrollment, and identity binding rather than an ESC label in tool output.

exploitation.zh: 在实验域先枚举并保存配置，只对专用测试身份请求证书；比较请求、颁发、PKINIT 与审计事件，任何模板修改都必须立即使用保存的配置回滚。
exploitation.en: Enumerate and save configuration in the lab, request certificates only for dedicated test identities, compare request, issuance, PKINIT, and audit events, and immediately restore any template modification from the saved configuration.

mitigation.zh: 收紧 Enrollment 与模板写权限，限制 Subject/SAN 供应和危险 EKU，移除不必要的 Web Enrollment，启用 EPA/HTTPS，并持续审计模板、CA 标志和异常证书请求。
mitigation.en: Restrict enrollment and template-write permissions, constrain subject or SAN supply and dangerous EKUs, remove unnecessary web enrollment, enable EPA and HTTPS, and continuously audit templates, CA flags, and anomalous certificate requests.

description.zh: 从对应工具卡读取当前命令和引用，记录 Certipy、Rubeus 或 Impacket 版本。
description.en: Read current commands and references from the relevant tool card and record the Certipy, Rubeus, or Impacket version.

description.zh: 导出 CA 与模板设置，标记合成测试身份、预期事件和停止条件。
description.en: Export CA and template settings and identify the synthetic test identity, expected events, and stop conditions.

title.en: Run and roll back the lab exercise

description.zh: 只执行工具卡中的批准命令，核对证书与日志后撤销测试证书并恢复配置。
description.en: Run only approved commands from the tool card, verify certificates and logs, then revoke test certificates and restore configuration.

analysis.zh: 阳性结论必须由具体配置组合、成功的实验身份绑定和对应 CA/KDC 审计事件共同证明。单个 ESC 标签、HTTP 200、模板名称或工具无报错都不足以确认可利用性。
analysis.en: A positive conclusion requires the exact configuration combination, successful binding to a lab identity, and matching CA or KDC audit events. One ESC label, HTTP 200 response, template name, or error-free tool run is insufficient.

opsecTips.zh: 限制请求次数和模板范围，所有输出写入 artifacts 目录，不保存真实私钥或生产身份材料。
opsecTips.en: Limit request count and template scope, write outputs to the artifacts directory, and never retain real private keys or production identity material.

opsecTips.zh: 模板变更前后比较配置哈希；出现非测试身份证书、CA 服务异常或回滚失败时立即停止。
opsecTips.en: Compare configuration hashes before and after template changes and stop on non-test certificates, CA service instability, or rollback failure.

review.rationale: 原卡片只包含 Certipy 与 Rubeus 调用，没有独立协议载荷；枚举、证书请求和证书认证统一迁入工具手册。

description.zh: 该源卡片由工具命令组成，现按 Certipy、Rubeus、Impacket 与 HTTP 端点审计职责拆分，不再作为独立 Payload 展示。
description.en: This source card consists of tool commands and is split by Certipy, Rubeus, Impacket, and HTTP endpoint-audit responsibility instead of remaining a standalone payload.

prerequisites.zh: 仅在隔离实验域使用合成身份、专用模板和可回滚 CA 配置，记录域、CA、模板与工具版本。
prerequisites.en: Use synthetic identities, dedicated templates, and rollback-ready CA configuration only in an isolated lab, recording domain, CA, template, and tool versions.

prerequisites.zh: 先导出模板与 CA 配置并建立证书、事件日志和网络流量采集，禁止向生产 CA 发起请求。

prerequisites.en: Export template and CA configuration first and enable certificate, event-log, and network capture without sending requests to a production CA.

overview.zh: ESC6 工作流 的原内容没有独立协议载荷，全部是命令行工具调用。迁移后，技术条件、证据和回滚要求保留在双语说明中，具体参数只在对应工具卡维护。
overview.en: The original ESC6 Workflow content has no standalone protocol payload and consists entirely of CLI invocations. After migration, technique conditions, evidence, and rollback requirements remain documented while parameters are maintained only in the relevant tool cards.

vulnerability.zh: AD CS 风险来自模板权限、扩展 Key Usage、Subject/SAN 供应、Enrollment Agent、CA 标志、Web Enrollment 与身份绑定组合，而不是工具输出中出现 ESC 标签。
vulnerability.en: AD CS risk comes from combinations of template permissions, extended key usage, subject or SAN supply, enrollment agents, CA flags, web enrollment, and identity binding rather than an ESC label in tool output.

exploitation.zh: 在实验域先枚举并保存配置，只对专用测试身份请求证书；比较请求、颁发、PKINIT 与审计事件，任何模板修改都必须立即使用保存的配置回滚。
exploitation.en: Enumerate and save configuration in the lab, request certificates only for dedicated test identities, compare request, issuance, PKINIT, and audit events, and immediately restore any template modification from the saved configuration.

mitigation.zh: 收紧 Enrollment 与模板写权限，限制 Subject/SAN 供应和危险 EKU，移除不必要的 Web Enrollment，启用 EPA/HTTPS，并持续审计模板、CA 标志和异常证书请求。
mitigation.en: Restrict enrollment and template-write permissions, constrain subject or SAN supply and dangerous EKUs, remove unnecessary web enrollment, enable EPA and HTTPS, and continuously audit templates, CA flags, and anomalous certificate requests.

description.zh: 从对应工具卡读取当前命令和引用，记录 Certipy、Rubeus 或 Impacket 版本。
description.en: Read current commands and references from the relevant tool card and record the Certipy, Rubeus, or Impacket version.

description.zh: 导出 CA 与模板设置，标记合成测试身份、预期事件和停止条件。
description.en: Export CA and template settings and identify the synthetic test identity, expected events, and stop conditions.

title.en: Run and roll back the lab exercise

description.zh: 只执行工具卡中的批准命令，核对证书与日志后撤销测试证书并恢复配置。
description.en: Run only approved commands from the tool card, verify certificates and logs, then revoke test certificates and restore configuration.

analysis.zh: 阳性结论必须由具体配置组合、成功的实验身份绑定和对应 CA/KDC 审计事件共同证明。单个 ESC 标签、HTTP 200、模板名称或工具无报错都不足以确认可利用性。
analysis.en: A positive conclusion requires the exact configuration combination, successful binding to a lab identity, and matching CA or KDC audit events. One ESC label, HTTP 200 response, template name, or error-free tool run is insufficient.

opsecTips.zh: 限制请求次数和模板范围，所有输出写入 artifacts 目录，不保存真实私钥或生产身份材料。
opsecTips.en: Limit request count and template scope, write outputs to the artifacts directory, and never retain real private keys or production identity material.

opsecTips.zh: 模板变更前后比较配置哈希；出现非测试身份证书、CA 服务异常或回滚失败时立即停止。
opsecTips.en: Compare configuration hashes before and after template changes and stop on non-test certificates, CA service instability, or rollback failure.

review.rationale: ESC6 条目只记录 Certipy 参数且沿用旧 -alt 写法；改为当前 -upn 请求语义并迁入 Certipy。

description.zh: 该源卡片由工具命令组成，现按 Certipy、Rubeus、Impacket 与 HTTP 端点审计职责拆分，不再作为独立 Payload 展示。
description.en: This source card consists of tool commands and is split by Certipy, Rubeus, Impacket, and HTTP endpoint-audit responsibility instead of remaining a standalone payload.

prerequisites.zh: 仅在隔离实验域使用合成身份、专用模板和可回滚 CA 配置，记录域、CA、模板与工具版本。
prerequisites.en: Use synthetic identities, dedicated templates, and rollback-ready CA configuration only in an isolated lab, recording domain, CA, template, and tool versions.

prerequisites.zh: 先导出模板与 CA 配置并建立证书、事件日志和网络流量采集，禁止向生产 CA 发起请求。
prerequisites.en: Export template and CA configuration first and enable certificate, event-log, and network capture without sending requests to a production CA.

opsecTips.en: Limit request count and template scope, write outputs to the artifacts directory, and never retain real private keys or production identity material.

opsecTips.en: Compare configuration hashes before and after template changes and stop on non-test certificates, CA service instability, or rollback failure.

review.rationale: ESC8 卡片混合 Certipy 枚举、Impacket 中继和 HTTP 端点探测；三种工具职责拆分到各自工具卡。
